positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial garden landscape. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna, including crescent moon moths and nebula lilies, nestled within crystalline branches. The overall mood is whimsical and deeply comforting. Use strong silhouettes against a gradient of deep midnight blue and ethereal lavender. The composition should be centered, suitable for wrapping around clothing. Style should be inspired by Art Nouveau graphic posters mixed with modern cosmic psychedelia, utilizing clean line work and spot coloring for high contrast. Perfect for a bold, full-color print on fabric, with clean edges and easily reproducible details. Vector art aesthetic, highly detailed, poster design, minimal depth of field, vibrant contrast.
